title: Prodige's Shop
body:
![th](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebda1f15c68dbbd5ee56e3a3479ba28f6056a09b_0.webp)

*Get rich, trade smart, and build your empire with **Shop**, a simple and complete datapack that brings a full economy system to your survival world!*

## How to use
Type `/trigger Shop` to open a menu where you can buy or sell all available items across multiple categories.

![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f152c0fd5b87c69e60ad81c096a2a6befc3a22ac.png)

## Sell and Buy easily:

* `/trigger Shop.sell` – sells the item in your hand
* `/trigger Shop.sell_all` – sells all items of the same type

![sell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e3ed1deab3fbe26ef2b5994c63d1c28e74e5058.png)
![buy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1256f32360570437d3d1ee8ff2198a30268fd04.png)


**This mod is Perfect for Skyblock-style gameplay or any world!**


## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function shop:uninstall
`

## Links
[![Our discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e22bf034ba3457c78764f14bff186f4b8ba505e.png)](https://discord.gg/b2hkD4Fn43)
